import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Dashboard = ({ user, onLogout }) => { const [cart, setCart] = useState([]); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState('all'); // Enhanced product data with better details const products = { tops: [ { id: 1, name: "Premium Cotton T-Shirt", price: 29.99, originalPrice: 39.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/667eea/ffffff?text=Premium+T-Shirt", rating: 4.8, reviews: 128, category: "tops", badge: "Best Seller", discount: 25 }, { id: 2, name: "Designer Denim Jacket", price: 89.99, originalPrice: 119.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/764ba2/ffffff?text=Denim+Jacket", rating: 4.9, reviews: 87, category: "tops", badge: "New", discount: 25 }, { id: 3, name: "Luxury Hoodie", price: 59.99, originalPrice: 79.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/48c9b0/ffffff?text=Luxury+Hoodie", rating: 4.7, reviews: 156, category: "tops", badge: "Sale", discount: 25 }, { id: 4, name: "Classic Polo Shirt", price: 39.99, originalPrice: 49.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/f39c12/ffffff?text=Polo+Shirt", rating: 4.6, reviews: 94, category: "tops", badge: "Popular", discount: 20 }, { id: 5, name: "Oxford Button Shirt", price: 49.99, originalPrice: 69.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/e74c3c/ffffff?text=Oxford+Shirt", rating: 4.8, reviews: 73, category: "tops", badge: "Premium", discount: 29 }, { id: 6, name: "Athletic Tank Top", price: 19.99, originalPrice: 24.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/9b59b6/ffffff?text=Tank+Top", rating: 4.5, reviews: 112, category: "tops", badge: "Sport", discount: 20 } ], bottoms: [ { id: 7, name: "Premium Blue Jeans", price: 79.99, originalPrice: 99.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/3498db/ffffff?text=Blue+Jeans", rating: 4.9, reviews: 203, category: "bottoms", badge: "Best Seller", discount: 20 }, { id: 8, name: "Tactical Cargo Pants", price: 69.99, originalPrice: 89.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/2ecc71/ffffff?text=Cargo+Pants", rating: 4.7, reviews: 145, category: "bottoms", badge: "Utility", discount: 22 }, { id: 9, name: "Summer Chino Shorts", price: 34.99, originalPrice: 44.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/f1c40f/ffffff?text=Chino+Shorts", rating: 4.6, reviews: 89, category: "bottoms", badge: "Summer", discount: 22 }, { id: 10, name: "Athletic Track Pants", price: 44.99, originalPrice: 59.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/e67e22/ffffff?text=Track+Pants", rating: 4.5, reviews: 167, category: "bottoms", badge: "Sport", discount: 25 }, { id: 11, name: "Formal Dress Pants", price: 89.99, originalPrice: 119.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/34495e/ffffff?text=Dress+Pants", rating: 4.8, reviews: 76, category: "bottoms", badge: "Formal", discount: 25 }, { id: 12, name: "Beach Swim Shorts", price: 29.99, originalPrice: 39.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/1abc9c/ffffff?text=Swim+Shorts", rating: 4.4, reviews: 134, category: "bottoms", badge: "Beach", discount: 25 } ], shoes: [ { id: 13, name: "Pro Running Sneakers", price: 129.99, originalPrice: 169.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/667eea/ffffff?text=Pro+Sneakers", rating: 4.9, reviews: 312, category: "shoes", badge: "Athletic", discount: 24 }, { id: 14, name: "Handcrafted Leather Boots", price: 189.99, originalPrice: 249.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/8b4513/ffffff?text=Leather+Boots", rating: 4.8, reviews: 98, category: "shoes", badge: "Luxury", discount: 24 }, { id: 15, name: "Casual Canvas Shoes", price: 59.99, originalPrice: 74.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/ff6b6b/ffffff?text=Canvas+Shoes", rating: 4.6, reviews: 187, category: "shoes", badge: "Casual", discount: 20 }, { id: 16, name: "Executive Dress Shoes", price: 159.99, originalPrice: 199.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/2f3542/ffffff?text=Dress+Shoes", rating: 4.7, reviews: 156, category: "shoes", badge: "Executive", discount: 20 }, { id: 17, name: "Comfort Sandals", price: 39.99, originalPrice: 49.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/ff9ff3/ffffff?text=Sandals", rating: 4.5, reviews: 223, category: "shoes", badge: "Comfort", discount: 20 }, { id: 18, name: "Street High-Tops", price: 99.99, originalPrice: 129.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300x400/54a0ff/ffffff?text=High+Tops", rating: 4.7, reviews: 145, category: "shoes", badge: "Street", discount: 23 } ] }; const addToCart = (product) => { setCart(prevCart => { const existingItem = prevCart.find(item => item.id === product.id); if (existingItem) { return prevCart.map(item => item.id === product.id ? { ...item, quantity: item.quantity + 1 } : item ); } return [...prevCart, { ...product, quantity: 1 }]; }); }; const removeFromCart = (productId) => { setCart(prevCart => prevCart.filter(item => item.id !== productId)); }; const getTotalItems = () => { return cart.reduce((total, item) => total + item.quantity, 0); }; const getTotalPrice = () => { return cart.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.price * item.quantity), 0).toFixed(2); }; const getTotalSavings = () => { return cart.reduce((total, item) => total + ((item.originalPrice - item.price) * item.quantity), 0).toFixed(2); }; const ProductCard = ({ product }) => (
{product.badge}
-{product.discount}%

{product.name}

{[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => ( ★ ))}
({product.rating}) • {product.reviews} reviews
${product.price} ${product.originalPrice} Save ${(product.originalPrice - product.price).toFixed(2)}
); const CategorySection = ({ title, categoryKey, icon }) => (

{icon} {title}

Discover our premium {title.toLowerCase()} collection

View All ({products[categoryKey].length}) →
{products[categoryKey].map(product => ( ))}
); return (
{/* Enhanced Header Section */}

🛍️ Welcome to StyleHub, {user?.name?.split(' ')[0]}!

Discover premium fashion with exclusive discounts up to 50% off

👤 Premium Member 🎯 Free Shipping 💳 Secure Checkout
setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} className="search-input" />
🛒 {getTotalItems()}
${getTotalPrice()}
Saved: ${getTotalSavings()}
{/* Enhanced Hero Banner */}

🔥 Summer Mega Sale 2025

Up to 50% off on premium fashion items + Free shipping on orders over $50

✨ Premium Quality 🚚 Fast Delivery 🔄 Easy Returns
{/* Product Categories */}
{/* Enhanced Stats Dashboard */}
🛍️

Total Products

{Object.values(products).flat().length}

Available items
🛒

Cart Items

{getTotalItems()}

Items in cart
💰

Cart Total

${getTotalPrice()}

Total amount
💳

${getTotalSavings()}

Amount saved
); }; export default Dashboard;
